# llms.txt — https://steelmanufacturer.in/llms.txt
# Sakshi Forge — Electropolished Pipe, SS Fittings & Flanges Manufacturer, Mumbai, India

> Sakshi Forge manufactures electropolished stainless steel pipes (ASTM A270/A269/A312, ASME BPE),
> EP pipe fittings (3-A, BS 4825, ASME BPE), forged flanges to 60" (ASME B16.5/B16.47),
> buttweld & forged fittings, SS pipes, round bars and fasteners. EN 10204 3.1/3.2 MTC,
> PMI & NDT tested. Exporting from Mumbai to GCC & Southeast Asia. Quote in 30 minutes.

## Products
- [Electropolished Pipes](https://steelmanufacturer.in/electropolished-pipes/): SS 304L/316L/904L/Duplex, 1/8"-24", Ra <= 0.4 um
- [EP Pipe Fittings](https://steelmanufacturer.in/electropolished-pipe-fittings/): 3-A, BS 4825, ASME BPE
- [Flanges](https://steelmanufacturer.in/flanges/): 10 types, 1/2"-60", Class 150-2500
- [Buttweld Fittings](https://steelmanufacturer.in/buttweld-fittings/): ASME B16.9, 1/2"-48"
- [SS Pipes & Tubes](https://steelmanufacturer.in/stainless-steel-pipes/): A312 seamless/welded, duplex
- [Weight Calculator](https://steelmanufacturer.in/weight-calculator/): free tool

## Company
- [Quality Assurance](https://steelmanufacturer.in/quality-assurance/): MTC, PMI, NDT, third-party inspection
- [Contact](https://steelmanufacturer.in/contact-us/): +91-8045815130, info@sakshiforge.in, Mumbai 400004
